cast.name: 奥斯卡·奈泽尔 Oskar Netzel

introduction: Brilliant but autistic architect Tom Pohlmann uses a psychology app as he needs to plan everything to the last detail from his morning sports program on, any surprise can make him panic and flee, even from the presentation of the firm he even from the firm he runs with suave, less talented partner Jens Kilian. On the way there he nearly ran over biking night nurse Sarah Wünsche, who hopes to earn enough to buy back her bankrupted kiosk by mini-bank-loan, which gets him condemned to community service a s orderly in the same hospital, where Sarah's twelve-year-old, frustrated son Paul is quartered with puzzling shortness of breath. Making up for an accidental clash, the loner boys start bonding, Tom discovers he can inspire child patients and romance develops with Sarah.
